markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify a surge in pipeline executions and align on workflow standards.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [A surge in pipeline executions (157 today) is due to a cleanup of the Airtable database, not new publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [The Airtable is the single source of truth for client accountability; it must be updated with all published articles, dates, and live links.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Automated publishing is mandatory for scalability and visibility; manual workarounds are prohibited. File engineering tickets for all pipeline failures.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [A systemic issue with broken links in generated articles is a pipeline bug requiring an engineering fix, not a manual workaround.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### Airtable Cleanup & Pipeline Surge

  - [**Problem:** A surge in pipeline executions (157 today) created confusion and a false impression of new publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [**Cause:** A cleanup of the Airtable database to fix data integrity issues.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
      - [**Issue 1:** Articles marked "published" had live URLs but no content (e.g., `101Domain.com`).](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
      - [**Issue 2:** No centralized folder for article documents; files were scattered across multiple sheets.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [**Solution:** Centralize all article documents in Google Docs, replacing the old sheet-based workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

### Workflow Standardization & Accountability

  - [**Requirement:** The Airtable must be updated with all published articles, dates, and live links.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is the single source of truth for internal visibility and client accountability.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Policy:** Use automated publishing workflows exclusively.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensures scalability and provides clear visibility in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - **Action:** File an engineering ticket or post in `#epd-help` for all pipeline failures.

### Systemic Issue: Broken Links

  - [**Problem:** Generated articles frequently contain broken links (e.g., to Webflow API endpoints).](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Impact:** This requires manual checks and fixes, creating a capacity bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Action:** File an engineering ticket with specific examples of broken links and affected runs.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a pipeline bug requiring a systemic fix, not a manual workaround.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)

### Other Workstreams

  - [**Use Case Guides:** Scaling to 5 articles/week. Some are unlisted because they lack meta-images, which the client is responsible for providing.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**Content Enrichment:** A separate workstream for adding content to existing client pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Najam:**](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [Update the Airtable with all published articles, dates, and live links today.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [File an engineering ticket for the broken link issue, including specific examples.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
      - [Use automated publishing workflows exclusively; file tickets for all failures.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6FexChZQfTDP-pw2oxRy6MyCqm-1nnY?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
